question: Can I change the date of travel for my first-class ticket, free of charge? What about difference in fare? What about availability?
evaluation_criteria: 1. First Class date changes are free of charge — no change fee applies
2. Any fare difference between the original ticket price and the new flight still applies
3. Changes are subject to seat availability on the new flight

question: I made a mistake when I booked the ticket. I mistakenly entered my name as 'Ed' Norton instead of 'Sam' Norton.  As per your policy, this change is a name correction, with three characters or fewer, and should be possible free of charge. Correct?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Distinguishes between a name correction (fixing a minor spelling error of up to 3 characters within the same name) and a name change (transferring the booking to a different person)
2. E.g. Changing 'Ed Norton' to 'Sam Norton' is a name change — a completely different first name — not a minor spelling correction
3. Name changes are not permitted on any fare class
4. Advises the passenger to cancel the existing booking (subject to fare class cancellation rules) and make a new booking in the correct name

question: I've performed online check-in, and wish to now proceed to the check-in gate with my service dog to catch my first-class flight to Berlin. What should I keep in mind?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Notes that online check-in is not available for passengers travelling with live animals in the cabin — the passenger should verify or complete their check-in at the airport counter
2. Must present at check-in: a certificate of training from an accredited service animal organization AND a veterinary health certificate dated within 10 days of travel
3. Service dog must wear a harness or identifying vest
4. Service dog must remain at the passenger's feet or on their lap for the duration of the flight; it cannot occupy a seat

question: I am a first class passenger, and want to check-in 10000 bags of 32 Kg each. Is that possible? If so, what will that cost me?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Notes that 10,000 bags is operationally impractical for standard passenger check-in and is not addressed by the reference manual — the passenger would need to contact SkyWay directly for arrangements at this scale
2. Does not fabricate a policy that explicitly permits or prohibits 10,000 bags as standard passenger baggage

question: I want to bring my cat on my SkyWay flight. What is your pet travel policy — can my cat fly in the cabin with me, and how much does it cost?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Clearly states the reference manual does not contain a general pet travel policy
2. Mentions recognized service animals (guide dogs, hearing dogs, psychiatric service dogs) are permitted in the cabin at no charge with appropriate documentation
3. Mentions emotional support animals are not accepted in the cabin and must travel as cargo through SkyWay Cargo
4. Does not fabricate a pet travel policy for cats or other non-service animals
5. Recommends contacting SkyWay Customer Service Centre or SkyWay Cargo for pet travel information

question: I am flying a long-haul flight on an economy light ticket, and I want to check-in an additional bag. How much will that cost me?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Economy Light on long-haul (6 hours or more) includes one checked bag (23 kg) in the fare
2. An additional bag (the second bag) costs EUR 45
3. Pre-purchasing the additional bag online is approximately 30% cheaper than purchasing at the airport

question: I am a second time mother. So under your guidelines, my current pregnancy would be a multiple pregnancy?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Clarifies that 'multiple pregnancy' is not clearly defined in SkyWay's policy
2. Requests passenger to get in touch with support helpline

question: I was denied boarding, and put on the next flight, which departs in 1 hour. What are my rights?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Entitled to EU261 compensation — the full amount (EUR 250, 400, or 600 depending on flight distance), with no 50% reduction
2. Being rebooked on the next available flight satisfies the rebooking entitlement

3. Care and assistance entitlements apply as mentioned in section 5.3. But since the wait is only 1 hour the minimum thresholds for meals and refreshments (2 hours for short-haul, 3 hours for medium-haul, 4 hours for long-haul) are not met. The system may or may not additionally mention whether the 1-hour threshold applies.

sources.title: Compensation for Delays and Cancellations (EU Regulation 261/2004)

question: I am a silver loyalty passenger, and want to check-in an additional bag on an economy light ticket. What should I pay?
evaluation_criteria: 1. Silver tier members receive one additional checked bag (23 kg) free on all SkyWay flights, regardless of fare class
2. The additional bag they wish to check is covered by this Silver benefit — no charge applies
3. If they need a further additional bag beyond the Silver benefit, the applicable Economy Light excess bag fee applies (EUR 45 for the next bag, EUR 80 for each one after that)

question: I booked an Economy Light ticket for a flight next week but I've fallen ill and can't travel. Can I get any money back?
evaluation_criteria: 1. States Economy Light fare is non-refundable — no cash refund or travel voucher for cancellations
2. Airport taxes and government-imposed fees are refundable upon request regardless of fare class
3. Does not fabricate or promise a medical exemption policy not documented in the reference material
